patch.value: Feature delivery includes settings/config surface, shared policy helper, command wiring, tests, and docs/changelog updates.
Implement missing-history stream policy and restore fallback
Ship strict-vs-auto history stream behavior plus restore missing-item recovery across command surfaces.
All history-touching commands honor configured missing-stream policy, restore can recover deleted/missing items from history-only state, and full verification succeeds.
Epic is in place and command/test/doc touchpoints are identified.
Makes missing-history handling explicit and predictable
Reduces operational failures and recovery dead-ends
Consistent command behavior in strict and default modes
Current flows are inconsistent between diagnostics, mutations, and restore
Prevents surprising failures when history files are missing
